project.title: LOGOS V1 Development Dashboard
project.note: Project not yet created. Requires a PAT with 'project' scope. See blocker note below.

blocker.reason: The Codespaces GITHUB_TOKEN is a GitHub App installation token with no OAuth scopes. GitHub Projects v2 mutations (createProjectV2, createProjectV2Field) require a classic PAT with 'repo' and 'project' scopes, or a fine-grained PAT with 'Projects: read and write' permission.
resolution: 1. Go to https://github.com/settings/tokens and create a classic PAT.
3. In the Codespaces terminal, run: export GH_TOKEN=ghp_<your-token>
5. This file will be overwritten with the real project ID and field IDs.
